# Read the provided text file
path = '/mnt/data/file-SZvJDfugcPc9WDLikt7gYQ-text_to_analyse.txt'
with open(path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    text = f.read()
text, len(text)

text = ' بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم "كتاب أنزلناه إليك مبارك ليدبروا آلاءه وليتذكر أولو الألباب". (سورة 29, الآية 28) حديث شريف يقول "خيركم من تعلم القرآن وعلمه" متفق عليه. لذلك فإن دراسة وتدبر القرآن واجب شرعي.'
# positions of basmala
basmala_str = "بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم"
i_basmala = text.find(basmala_str)
i_basmala, basmala_str, text[i_basmala:i_basmala+len(basmala_str)]

# Find pairs of double quotes
indices = [i for i, ch in enumerate(text) if ch == '"']
indices

ayah_span = (indices[0]+1, indices[1])
ayah_text = text[ayah_span[0]:ayah_span[1]]
ayah_span, ayah_text, len(ayah_text)

hadith_span = (indices[2]+1, indices[3])
hadith_text = text[hadith_span[0]:hadith_span[1]]
hadith_span, hadith_text, len(hadith_text)

output.code:
text = ' بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم "كتاب أنزلناه إليك مبارك ليدبروا آلاءه وليتذكر أولو الألباب". (سورة 29, الآية 28) حديث شريف يقول "خيركم من تعلم القرآن وعلمه" متفق عليه. لذلك فإن دراسة وتدبر القرآن واجب شرعي.'

basmala_str = "بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم"
basmala_span = (text.find(basmala_str), text.find(basmala_str) + len(basmala_str))

ayah_span = (text.index('"')+1, text.index('"', text.index('"')+1))
ayah_text = text[ayah_span[0]:ayah_span[1]]

# find second pair of quotes
q1 = ayah_span[1]+1
q3 = text.index('"', q1)
q4 = text.index('"', q3+1)
hadith_span = (q3+1, q4)
hadith_text = text[hadith_span[0]:hadith_span[1]]

basmala_span, text[basmala_span[0]:basmala_span[1]], ayah_span, ayah_text, hadith_span, hadith_text

content.text: {"citations":[{"span_start":1,"span_end":23,"span_text":"بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم","citation_type":"Aya","is_valid":false,"aya_reference":{"sura_name":"الفاتحة","sura_number":1,"aya_number":1},"hadeeth_reference":{ "collection_name": "", "book_number": 0, "hadith_number": 0 },"corrected_text":"بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ","completely_invalid":false},{"span_start":25,"span_end":83,"span_text":"كتاب أنزلناه إليك مبارك ليدبروا آلاءه وليتذكر أولو الألباب","citation_type":"Aya","is_valid":false,"aya_reference":{"sura_name":"ص","sura_number":38,"aya_number":29},"hadeeth_reference":{ "collection_name": "", "book_number": 0, "hadith_number": 0 },"corrected_text":"كِتَابٌ أَنْزَلْنَاهُ إِلَيْكَ مُبَارَكٌ لِيَدَّبَّرُوا آيَاتِهِ وَلِيَتَذَكَّرَ أُولُو الْأَلْبَابِ","completely_invalid":false},{"span_start":122,"span_end":148,"span_text":"خيركم من تعلم القرآن وعلمه","citation_type":"Hadeeth","is_valid":false,"aya_reference":{  "sura_name": "", "sura_number": 0, "aya_number": 0 },"hadeeth_reference":{"collection_name":"Sahih Bukhari","book_number":61,"hadith_number":5027},"corrected_text":"خَيْرُكُمْ مَنْ تَعَلَّمَ الْقُرْآنَ وَعَلَّمَهُ","completely_invalid":false}]}

citations.description: List of citations with details, validation, references, and per-citation corrections.

span_start.description: Inclusive start character index of the citation within the text (exclude the qutation marks).

span_end.description: Exclusive end character index of the citation within the text (exclude the qutation marks).

span_text.description: The text content of the citation span.

citation_type.description: Type of the citation: either Aya (Quran) or Hadeeth (Prophetic tradition).

is_valid.description: True if the cited Aya or Hadeeth is recognized and valid, false otherwise.

aya_reference.description: Quranic reference details (required if citation_type is Aya; empty object if not applicable).

sura_name.description: Name of the sura (chapter) in the Quran.

sura_number.description: Number of the sura (chapter) in the Quran.

aya_number.description: Number of the aya (verse) in the Quran.

hadeeth_reference.description: Hadeeth reference details (required if citation_type is Hadeeth; empty object if not applicable).

collection_name.description: Name of the Hadeeth collection in english (e.g. Sahih Bukhari, Muslim).

hadith_number.description: Hadith number within the specified book.

corrected_text.description: The corrected version of the citation text (or the text itself if it was correct in the first place) (e.g. if there are certain words that were invalid this version must have this corrected), or 'خطأ' for completely invalid citations (i.e. no close enough citation can be found to correct the text). If there are close texts in Quran or Hadith - but too far from the citation, this must be considered 'خطأ' and completely_invalid must be true.

completely_invalid.description: Set to true if the citation is completely invalid i.e. there can't be a close enough text to correct it, (corrected_text must be 'خطأ').
